asymmetry: NHS hospital fitted braces on up to 21 patients including a teenager using unsterilised equipment, putting them at risk of HIV, Hepatitis B, and Hepatitis C.
hook: An NHS hospital gave teenagers HIV risk with dirty braces.
core_fact: 21 patients — including at least one teenager — are at risk of contracting HIV, Hepatitis B, and Hepatitis C after unsterilised orthodontic equipment was used during NHS procedures.
villain: The NHS hospital trust responsible for the unsterilised orthodontic equipment failure (identity to be confirmed via source reporting).
share_trigger: Did you see this? An NHS hospital used dirty equipment on kids getting braces and now they might have HIV.
search_query: NHS hospital unsterilised braces HIV hepatitis risk patients 2025 UK news
